allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "$env:USERPROFILE\\.claude" -Depth 1 | Select-Object FullName, Attributes, LastWriteTime | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "$env:USERPROFILE\\.claude\\projects" -Depth 0 | ForEach-Object { $size = \(Get-ChildItem $_.FullName -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object -Property Length -Sum\).Sum; [PSCustomObject]@{Name=$_.Name; Files=\(Get-ChildItem $_.FullName -Recurse -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Count; SizeMB=[math]::Round\($size/1MB,2\)} })
PowerShell(Set-Location "$env:USERPROFILE\\.claude"; git init; git add -A; git status --short | Select-Object -First 20; Write-Host "...and more" -ForegroundColor Yellow)
PowerShell(Set-Location "$env:USERPROFILE\\.claude"; git status --short 2>&1 | Measure-Object -Line | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Lines)
PowerShell(Set-Location "$env:USERPROFILE\\.claude"; git commit -m "initial sync: agents, projects, settings")
PowerShell(Set-Location "$env:USERPROFILE\\.claude"; git config user.email "13pheeb@gmail.com"; git config user.name "9133BEE"; git commit -m "initial sync: agents, projects, settings")
